description_long: This is a cylindrical tube of lotion with a light blue body and a green band near the base, topped with a white cap. The front of the tube features the brand name 'Remos' prominently, along with an illustration of citrus fruits, suggesting a citrus scent or ingredient. The packaging includes both Vietnamese and English text, with a circular logo at the top and additional product information below the brand name. The tube appears to be made of flexible plastic, designed to be squeezed to dispense the lotion. The cap is likely a screw-on or snap-on type, providing a secure closure to prevent leaks. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on freshness and personal care.
description: A light blue, cylindrical lotion tube with a green band and white cap, featuring 'Remos' branding and citrus fruit graphics. The packaging is clean and modern, with both text and illustrations.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Remos' brand, citrus fruit graphics, and product information clearly displayed on the light blue tube.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the tube's conical shape and the green band near the base, with minimal visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: The rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the same branding and graphics, indicating a symmetrical design.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the conical shape and green band, with little to no visible text or graphics.
